Revel
Fremont
Korean Fusion · $
🎉 Lively🔥 Open Kitchen🍜 Shareable
📍 401 N 36th St 📞 (206) 547-2040

Why it's fun: A quintessential Seattle spot with a massive open kitchen. Chef Rachel Yang's creative Korean comfort food is perfect for sharing, and the energy is always buzzing.

Researched for north Seattle: Ballard, Fremont, Green Lake, Queen Anne
